full_text:
Yin Kui 殷馗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Kui (殷馗)was born in Liaodong. An expert in astrology, he predicted a Perfect Man would rise, later thought to mean Cao Cao. Yin Kui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
